# autochamber

Utilities for processing greenhouse gas data from automated chambers in
R.

Contact: Abigail Lewis (<abigail.sl.lewis@gmail.com>)

## Description

`autochamber` provides functions to process CH₄, CO₂, and N₂O data from
automated flux chambers. It includes tools for:

- Visualizing, trimming, and compiling raw data
- Calculating fluxes
- Flagging data using maintenance logs and QA/QC filters
- Plotting calculated fluxes

## Installation

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("abbylewis/autochamber")
library(autochamber)
```

## Documentation

Full workflow vignette:
<https://abbylewis.github.io/autochamber/articles/Example_flux_processing.html>

# Package index

## All functions

- [`add_maintenance_log()`](https://abbylewis.github.io/autochamber/reference/add_maintenance_log.md)
  : Add maintenance log
- [`calculate_flux()`](https://abbylewis.github.io/autochamber/reference/calculate_flux.md)
  : calculate_flux
- [`combine_slopes()`](https://abbylewis.github.io/autochamber/reference/combine_slopes.md)
  : Combine slopes
- [`data_small_chapada`](https://abbylewis.github.io/autochamber/reference/data_small_chapada.md)
  : Formatted data from Chapada
- [`data_small_genx`](https://abbylewis.github.io/autochamber/reference/data_small_genx.md)
  : Data from GENX and Chapada flux chambers
- [`filter_fluxes_by_SE()`](https://abbylewis.github.io/autochamber/reference/filter_fluxes_by_SE.md)
  : Remove fluxes with low SE
- [`generate_recent_raw()`](https://abbylewis.github.io/autochamber/reference/generate_recent_raw.md)
  : Generate recent raw data
- [`group_fun()`](https://abbylewis.github.io/autochamber/reference/group_fun.md)
  : Assign groups for separate readings
- [`plot_calculated_fluxes()`](https://abbylewis.github.io/autochamber/reference/plot_calculated_fluxes.md)
  : Plot calculated fluxes
- [`plot_raw_data()`](https://abbylewis.github.io/autochamber/reference/plot_raw_data.md)
  : Plot raw flux chamber data
